_doc: A/B scorecard — Game Plan 1A (intraday-momentum / morning_sign gate). PROPOSE-ONLY (Rule 9): no live doctrine/params changed. UPDATED 2026-06-19 with the FULLY-CAUSAL re-run + IS/OOS split that decides this lead. Raw evidence: morning-sign-gate.json (baseline detector, now with causal_arms + oos_split blocks). Generator: backtest/autoresearch/validate_morning_sign_gate.py.
title: Gate BEARISH_REJECTION continuation entries to DOWN-morning days only (morning_sign)
rationale: Gao-Han-Li-Zhou (JFE 2018) Market Intraday Momentum: first-30min SPY return predicts last-30min, bearish when morning is red. Hypothesis: gating the confirmed BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING detector to fire only on DOWN-morning days improves real-fills expectancy. The ORIGINAL (look-ahead-tainted) run looked strong (ATM exp -21.58 -> +22.83). The CAUSAL + OOS re-run RETIRES the lead — see verdict.
revision_note: Chased to a definitive verdict: killed the ~19% look-ahead (restrict gate to entries >=10:00 ET so morning_sign is final before entry) and added a balanced IS/OOS split. Result flips the verdict from 'needs_review/promising' to REJECT. Most of the edge was look-ahead; the residual reverses sign out-of-sample.
verdict_headline: DEAD-ON-CAUSALITY + OOS-INVERSION. ~$34/contract of the $44 ATM headline edge was look-ahead (morning_sign peeked before entry on ~19% of signals). The strictly-causal residual (+$10 ATM) does NOT survive a balanced out-of-sample split — the morning_sign relationship REVERSES sign in the second half (OOS the UP-morning arm becomes the winner, +$99 vs DOWN -$12 ATM). That is the signature of in-sample fitting / regime-dependence, not a stable edge. DSR also stays far below significance (causal DOWN 0.34 ATM, 0.38 ITM2; << 0.95). RETIRE as a live gate.
_causal_fix_section: THE MAKE-OR-BREAK. morning_sign is final only at the 10:00 ET close, but BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING can trigger from 09:35. The fix: restrict the gate to entries at/after 10:00 ET (then morning_sign is strictly known before the entry it gates). Both arms below are real-fills (simulator_real over OPRA, the WR/expectancy AUTHORITY), puts, chart-stop-only, qty=3. 'baseline' under causal = ungated on the SAME causal pool (the honest A/B denominator).

causal_vs_original_atm._note: ATM = J's anchor strike class. The headline edge collapses by ~77% once look-ahead is removed.

causal_vs_original_itm2._note: ITM2 = Gamma-Bold strike class. Same story: most of the edge was look-ahead, residual is thin.

_oos_section: THE DECIDER. Calendar 2025/2026 split is degenerate (OPRA real-fills concentrate in 2025; only n=2-3 causal fills land in 2026 — no OOS power, and all of them DOWN-morning so the gate is a no-op). The honest read is a BALANCED median-date split (boundary 2025-11-18) so each half carries a real sample. The causal gate REVERSES sign out-of-sample.

oos_balanced_median_atm.interpretation: IS: DOWN-gate crushes (+74.93 vs baseline, beats inverse). OOS: DOWN-gate HURTS (-31.70) and the INVERSE (UP morning) is the winner (+99.00). The relationship flipped — the centerpiece 'inverse confirms signal' cross-check inverts too.

oos_balanced_median_itm2.interpretation: Identical pattern to ATM: strong IS (+182.84), inverts OOS (-46.56, UP arm wins +122.18). Both strike classes fail OOS the same way — this is regime-dependence, not strike-specific noise.

oos_calendar_2025_2026_degenerate._note: Why the calendar split is uninformative: OOS half has almost no fills.

atm.reason: all 2026 causal fills are DOWN-morning, so the gate removes nothing OOS (no-op).

_significance_section: DSR/PSR (lib/validation/deflated_sharpe, n_trials=3) on the CAUSAL BEARISH_REJECTION-scoped population. Honest about n + power.

causal_down_atm.note: in-power on n but DSR 0.34 << 0.95 — not significant.

oos_down_atm.note: OOS DOWN arm not significant AND negative-expectancy.

significance.verdict: Even the full-window causal DOWN arm is far from the 0.95 significance line; the OOS DOWN arm is both underpowered AND wrong-signed. No significance support for a live gate.

_scope_section: Scope discipline (lessons C22/C29: gates don't transfer across detectors). The gate was tested ONLY on BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING (the confirmed setup). It HURT LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE last cycle (opposite sign) — confirmed NOT generalized. Even scoped strictly to the confirmed setup, it fails the causal+OOS test.
scope_confirmed: BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING only. Not applied to LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE (anti-correlated, see morning-sign-gate-allstreams.json). The causal fix does not rescue it even on the in-scope detector.
_a_b_runs_section: Both arms are PARTITIONS of ONE real-fills universe (same simulate_trade_real run over the same OPRA contracts + ribbon series), differing ONLY by the morning_sign filter and the >=10:00 ET causal restriction. data_hash identical by construction.
_metrics_section: Headline metrics retained for continuity = the ORIGINAL look-ahead-tainted full-window ATM (what the lead claimed). See causal_vs_original_* for the corrected numbers that decide it.

expectancy._caveat: LOOK-AHEAD-TAINTED. Causal value = +16.17 (delta only +10.34 vs causal baseline +5.83).

anchor_edge_capture_realfills._caveat: Tie on n=1 (only 4/29 of J's 6 anchors fired this detector on real fills).

dsr._caveat: Tainted. Causal DOWN DSR = 0.3445; OOS DOWN DSR = 0.1303.

itm2_metrics._note: ITM2 = Gamma-Bold strike class. Tainted numbers retained; causal values in causal_vs_original_itm2.

expectancy._caveat: LOOK-AHEAD-TAINTED. Causal value = +29.70 (delta +22.87 vs causal baseline +6.83) — but inverts OOS.

_inverse_cross_check_section: The ORIGINAL inverse cross-check (full-window, tainted) looked like clean confirmation: UP-morning bearish entries were the losers (-90.66). BUT the balanced OOS split shows the inverse FLIPS: out-of-sample the UP arm is the WINNER (+99.00 ATM, +122.18 ITM2). So the cross-check that was the centerpiece of the bull case does NOT hold out of sample — it was an in-sample artefact.

inverse_morning_up_causal._but_oos: ...but OOS (balanced) the UP arm is POSITIVE and the DOWN arm negative — the relationship inverts. Full-window causal UP-negative is dominated by the IS half.

dominates_reason: After the causal fix and a balanced IS/OOS split, the DOWN gate does NOT dominate: most of the apparent edge was look-ahead, the causal residual is thin and not significant, and it REVERSES sign out-of-sample (the inverse arm wins OOS). Anchor edge_capture ties on n=1. Fails every bar that matters.
_sub_window_stability_section: Balanced median-date split (2025-11-18). NOT stable — sign inverts between halves. This is the disqualifying finding.

sub_window_stability.note: ATM shown; ITM2 identical pattern (IS +182.84 / OOS -46.56). Sign inversion across halves = fail.

_family_scope_section: Scope discipline (lessons C22/C29). Unchanged from prior pass: the gate is structure-specific and HURTS LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE. See morning-sign-gate-allstreams.json.

family_cross_check.BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING: REJECTED after causal+OOS fix — most edge was look-ahead; residual inverts OOS. Was 'the confirmed edge' on the tainted run; is NOT a live-gate candidate.
family_cross_check.HEAD_AND_SHOULDERS_BEAR: DIRECTIONALLY-HELPS-BUT-TINY-N (ITM2 -132.2 -> -47.66) — n_obs 7-8, low_power True; advisory only. Not re-tested causally (too thin to matter).
family_cross_check.LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE: HURTS / CONTRADICTS — DOWN-gate WORSENS it; the UP arm is the profitable one. The counter-example proving morning_sign is structure-specific, not a universal bearish filter.
family_cross_check.BEARISH_REVERSAL_AT_LEVEL: WASH — countertrend contrast, n_obs 3-4, no signal.

_acceptance_section: Auto-ratification gate. Fails closed. Multiple disqualifiers.
_verdict_note: DEAD-ON-CAUSALITY. The lead was a look-ahead mirage plus in-sample fitting. (1) CAUSALITY: removing the ~19% pre-10:00 look-ahead drops the ATM edge from +$44.41 to +$10.34/contract (and the causal baseline itself goes positive +$5.83, so the gate adds little). (2) OOS: on a balanced median split the causal gate REVERSES sign — IS DOWN +63.05 / OOS DOWN -11.96 (ATM), with the inverse UP arm becoming the OOS winner (+99.00). ITM2 identical (IS +183.23 / OOS -34.95). (3) SIGNIFICANCE: causal DOWN DSR 0.34 ATM / 0.38 ITM2, both << 0.95; OOS DOWN DSR 0.13 and negative-signed. RETIRE the lead. No live gate, no WATCH (the OOS sign-inversion means there is nothing directionally reliable to accumulate). The honest engine takeaway is unchanged from the bearish-continuation family scorecard: BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON is the entry; leverage is in EXIT/REGIME work, not a morning_sign entry gate.

causality_caveat._doc: RESOLVED in this pass — the caveat became the headline. Documented here for the audit trail.
causality_caveat.resolution: Re-ran with the gate restricted to entries >=10:00 ET (morning_sign final before entry). The causal numbers are in causal_arms.* of the evidence JSON and causal_vs_original_* here. They do not support a live gate.

decision_note: Retired after fully-causal re-run + balanced IS/OOS split. Edge was ~77% look-ahead (ATM) and the causal residual inverts sign out-of-sample. Not a real new edge. J/conductor: no action needed; this is a NEGATIVE result (a lead correctly killed). Lesson candidate: 'a peer-reviewed cross-sectional effect (intraday momentum) is not automatically a tradeable 0DTE option gate — verify causality AND OOS sign-stability before believing an inverse-arm cross-check.'
trigger_observation: markdown/planning/WEEKEND-RESEARCH-GAMEPLANS-2026-06-19.md Game Plan 1: Gao-Han-Li-Zhou (JFE 2018) Market Intraday Momentum. Original tainted backtest flipped ATM exp -21.58 -> +22.83. Causal + OOS re-run on 2026-06-19 retires it.

op20_disclosures.authority: Real-fills (simulator_real, OPRA valid ~through 2026-05-29) is the WR/expectancy authority. Arms partition ONE fill set, so deltas isolate the gate (no re-sim noise).
op20_disclosures.levels: Historically-rebuilt star-2 proxies (active+multi_day _detect_from_history), NOT production star-3 named levels. No look-ahead (ctx.prior_bars <= current bar).
op20_disclosures.morning_sign: sign(open[first RTH bar] -> close[last bar <=10:00 ET]). Causal gate = applied ONLY to entries at/after 10:00 ET (signal bar close >= 10:00, entry at >= 10:05), so morning_sign is strictly known before entry. The top-level 'arms' block (tainted) applies it to all 09:35-12:00 entries.
op20_disclosures.dsr: Deflated Sharpe via lib/validation, n_trials=3. Causal DOWN 0.34 ATM / 0.38 ITM2 < 0.95 significance line. OOS DOWN 0.13. Directional at best, never significant (lesson C24).
op20_disclosures.chart_stop: premium_stop_pct=-0.99 (chart-stop only) per L51/L55. Puts, qty=3, ATM + ITM2.
op20_disclosures.oos_method: Calendar 2025/2026 split is degenerate (OOS n=2-3, all DOWN-morning => gate is a no-op). Reported a BALANCED median-causal-fill-date split (2025-11-18) for a powered out-of-sample read. The gate's sign inverts across that split.
